creator: frank@dynamical-systems.org
text:
Hi Gabor,

I'm really sorry for the hassle with that file. You can get an uudecoded  
copy here:

http://www.senax.net/downloads/linux_base-slackware.shar.Z

At the same location you'll find a linux_base-slackware.shar.Z.MD5, just 
to ensure you get it correctly. -- Right now the PR database is busy, so I 
can't say if again the uuencoded stuff was corrupted by mailing it.

Thanks for your patience,
Frank
